zh.West Woodhay, Berkshire, England: 英國波克夏韋斯特 武德海
zh.Harringworth, Northamptonshire, England: 英國諾薩普頓史爾哈利沃斯
zh.lifeSummary: 當Lady Margaret Cheney於1512年1月1日出生在英國波克夏韋斯特 武德海時，她的父親John Cheney of West Woodhay, Berkshire32歲，母親Jane Norreys30歲。她於1550年之前與Sir Richard de La Zouche在英國多瑟特結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。她去世於1552年1月1日在英國諾薩普頓史爾哈利沃斯享年40歲。

zh-hans.West Woodhay, Berkshire, England: 英国波克夏韋斯特 武德海
zh-hans.Harringworth, Northamptonshire, England: 英国諾薩普頓史爾哈利沃斯
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lady Margaret Cheney于1512年1月1日出生在英国波克夏韋斯特 武德海时，她的父亲John Cheney of West Woodhay, Berkshire32岁，母亲Jane Norreys30岁。她于1550年之前与Sir Richard de La Zouche在英国多瑟特结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。她去世于1552年1月1日在英国諾薩普頓史爾哈利沃斯享年40岁。

nameMeanings.name: Cheney
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: variant of   Chaney   with the same etymology as in 2 below.

French: topographic name for someone who lived by or in an oak wood, from Old French chesnai ‘oak grove’ (from chesne ‘oak’), or a habitational name from any of several places called (Le) Cheney, e.g. in Haute-Savoie, named with this word. Compare Chesney .

French Canadian: altered form of French Chesnay or Chenay, topographic names with the same meaning and etymology as in 2 above, or habitational names from (Le) Chesnay or (Le) Chenay, names of several places in the northwestern part of France, based on Old French chesnai ‘oak grove’. Compare Chenette and Chenier 2.

variants.name: Chenette
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Lucien, Armand.
Altered form of French Canadian Chenet, itself an (intermediate) altered form of Cheney 3. Altered ending reflects the Canadian and American French practice of sounding the final -t.
History: The (majority of the) Chenettes are descendants of Bertrand Chesnay/Chenay dit/sieur de La Garenne from Brittany (France); see Cheney .

variants.name: Chaney
meanings: English (of Norman origin): habitational name from any one of several places in Normandy, Picardy, or Artois (France) named (Le) Quesnay or Quesnoy, or elsewhere in northern France named (Le or La) Chesnay or Chesnoy. The placenames all derive from Old French chesnai or its Normanno-Picard equivalent quesnai ‘oak grove’ (medieval Latin casnetum).
French: variant of Chanet, a habitational name from any of various places called Chanet or Le Chanet, from Latin canna ‘reed’ + the suffix -etum denoting an inhabitant.

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

en.lifeSummary: When Lady Margaret Cheney was born on 1 January 1512, in West Woodhay, Berkshire, England, her father, John Cheney of West Woodhay, Berkshire, was 32 and her mother, Jane Norreys, was 30. She married Sir Richard de La Zouche before 1550, in Dorset, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son. She died on 1 January 1552, in Harringworth, Northamptonshire, England, at the age of 40.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lady Margaret Cheney est née le 1 janvier 1512, à West Woodhay, Berkshire, Angleterre, son père, John Cheney of West Woodhay, Berkshire, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Jane Norreys, avait 30 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Richard de La Zouche avant 1550, à Dorset, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Elle est décédée le 1 janvier 1552, à Harringworth, Northamptonshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 40 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lady Margaret Cheney am 1. Januar 1512 in West Woodhay, Berkshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John Cheney of West Woodhay, Berkshire 32 und ihre Mutter Jane Norreys 30. Sie hat vor 1550 in Dorset, England Sir Richard de La Zouche geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Sie starb am 1. Januar 1552 im Alter von 40 Jahren in Harringworth, Northamptonshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Margaret Cheney è nata il il 1 gennaio 1512 nel West Woodhay, Berkshire, England, sua padre, John Cheney of West Woodhay, Berkshire, aveva 32 anni e sua madre, Jane Norreys, aveva 30 anni. Lei sposato Sir Richard de La Zouche prima del 1550, nel Dorset, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì il 1 gennaio 1552, nel Harringworth, Northamptonshire, England, all'età di 40 anni.

ja.Harringworth, Northamptonshire, England: イギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアハーリングウオルス

ja.lifeSummary: Lady Margaret Cheneyが1512年1月1日にイギリスバークシュアイアウエスト ウッドヘイで生まれた時，父John Cheney of West Woodhay, Berkshireは32歳，母Jane Norreysは30歳であった。1550年以前にイギリスドールセトでSir Richard de La Zoucheと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼女は1552年1月1日にイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアハーリングウオルスで40歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Lady Margaret Cheney(이)가 1512년 1월 1일 영국 버크실르 웨스트 우드하이에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John Cheney of West Woodhay, Berkshire(은)는 32세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Jane Norreys(은)는 30세였다. 그녀는 1550년 이전 영국 도르세트에서 Sir Richard de La Zouche(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1552년 1월 1일 영국 노르섬프토실르 해링워스에서 40세의 나이로 사망했다.

mn.1 January 1512–1 January 1552: 1512 оны Нэгдүгээр сарын 1–1552 оны Нэгдүгээр сарын 1

pt.1 January 1512–1 January 1552: 1 de janeiro de 1512–1 de janeiro de 1552
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Margaret Cheney nasceu em 1 de janeiro de 1512, em West Woodhay, Berkshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, John Cheney of West Woodhay, Berkshire, tinha 32 anos e sua mãe, Jane Norreys, tinha 30 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir Richard de La Zouche antes 1550, em Dorset, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ela faleceu em 1 de janeiro de 1552, em Harringworth, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, com 40 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lady Margaret Cheney родилась 1 января 1512 г. в местности вест вудхеи, биркшир, Англия, её отцу по имени John Cheney of West Woodhay, Berkshire было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Jane Norreys, 30. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Richard de La Zouche перед 1550 г. в местности дорсет, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Она умерла 1 января 1552 г. в местности харрингворт, нортамптоншир, Англия в возрасте 40 лет.

es.1 January 1512–1 January 1552: 1 de enero de 1512–1 de enero de 1552
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Lady Margaret Cheney nació el 1 de enero de 1512, en West Woodhay, Berkshire, Inglaterra, su papá, John Cheney of West Woodhay, Berkshire, tenía 32 años y su mamá, Jane Norreys, tenía 30 años. Se casó con Sir Richard de La Zouche antes de 1550, en Dorset, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió el 1 de enero de 1552, en Harringworth, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 40 años.
